style_safety_policy: This author_craft_card represents distillation failure, not author craft extraction. No narrative content was processed; all 599 chapters returned LLM unavailable fallback stubs. No prose style, voice, or craft decisions are represented herein. Future extraction should await functional LLM pipeline availability.
pov_and_distance: close-third or project-selected POV with controlled narrative distance
sentence_rhythm: vary short action beats with medium explanatory sentences
paragraphing: keep paragraphs functional: action, reaction, or information turn
dialogue_system: use role-specific intent, subtext, and conflict pressure
description_strategy: describe only details that change stakes, mood, or reader inference
exposition_strategy: place exposition after visible need or conflict pressure
emotional_temperature: surface emotion through choices, body action, and withheld admission
hooking_and_transitions: end units on changed state, unresolved question, or sharper constraint
adaptation_guidelines: This craft card cannot guide adaptation or authoring. When source chapters become available through a functioning LLM pipeline, subsequent distillation should extract: POV distance and consistency patterns, sentence rhythm and length variation, paragraph rhythm and white space usage, dialogue attribution and subtext mechanics, sensory and spatial description density, exposition placement and show-dont-tell ratios, emotional temperature arc progression, and hook-transition techniques at chapter and scene openings and closings.
taboo_copy_signals: Taboo fields do not apply. Source data consists entirely of system-generated fallback stubs (confidence 0.0) with no extractable author-specific prose, phrases, named entities, or distinctive sentence structures. No copy-risk signals present because no authored content exists in this distillation package.
